subject: Model defocus
body:
Hi Dimitry,

I have a question about values given in Models under defocus tab during CTF 
estimation.
By default the values are set to 5x5x1. What if I try to reduce the values 
to 1x5x1 or something else? I tried to reduce the values because my pixel 
size is 0.415.
Could you please give some idea about it?


Thanks,
Suruchi Singh
Postdoctoral Fellow
Vaccine and Infectious Disease Division
Fred Hutchinson Cancer Research center
Seattle, WA
